title: Combat Maids
description: This mod brings stylish combat maid suits and game mechanics into Minecraft!
body:
# Combat Maids Mod
## Description:
This mod brings stylish **combat maid suits** into Minecraft, thanks to request of my friends! 
Equip yourself with **unique maid outfits** that looks absolutely great! **Mod is made for fun**, so **if you have any cool ideas** to further enhance the mod, **we're eager to hear them**!
Mod is made for fun
## Preview:
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10f1bcc97fdae23e258bc239fb8e83c1152bc626_0.webp)
## Issues:
If you stumble upon any [issues](https://github.com/KViEternal/Combat_Maid_Mod/issues), or have cool [ideas](https://github.com/KViEternal/Combat_Maid_Mod/issues) to improve the mod, we're all ears!
